# Transcrição: 03-Sales Funnel Action Plan

## [00:00 - 01:18]

All right, so you've learned a lot about sales funnels. You've seen a lot of different resources. This action plan is designed to be a step by step. What do I do and what order? And really what we've done here is we've summarized exactly what you need to do to hit your goal. Because remember, that's what matters. And your goal here is to get a funnel launched and make your first sale. So as we go through this, you'll see that this step by step action plan really takes a lot of information from the manual and from the checklist and really consolidates all the resources into a very simple step by step process. So step one, you're gonna create your account. Then step two, you're gonna get your email marketer up and running. And then from there, you're gonna decide what kind of funnel do you wanna build. You're gonna get ready to accept major credit cards. You're gonna build your funnel pages and prepare to launch. And obviously that's the biggest step of all. All right, after that, you're gonna test your transactions just to make sure that it works. You're gonna start driving real traffic, real people to your funnels. And then you make that first sale and you celebrate. So just know that all this action plan is is all the stuff that you've already seen in other parts of the system really just consolidated to just give you crystal clarity so you can go kick some funnel butt.
